name: Qingtian Express Co.
message: www.uniques.com.tw https://www.zoominfo.com/c/qingtian-express-co-ltd/445536083 Unique Express Co., Ltd. is a Taiwan-based logistics and freight forwarding company that provides international and domestic supply chain and transportation services. The company focuses on door-to-door cargo delivery, including air and ocean freight, customs brokerage, warehousing, inland transportation, and cargo consolidation. It handles a wide range of shipments such as oversized, valuable, dangerous, and exhibition goods, offering tailored logistics solutions and documentation support. Founded in the 1970s and based in Taipei, Unique Express serves global clients and is a member of major international logistics and freight associations. Designated as an official air freight forwarder for the National Space Program Office, supporting the transport and installation of satellites and related ground equipment, and holds multiple security. IATA and FIATA.
